MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salceda.
This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds and Minor's Compromise Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salceda.
Bryan Bordon, Esq. for Plaintiff: Edith Wilder, not present.
No appearance by Legal Heir, Yvonne Rozell, Melissa Thompson, Dale Thompson, Holly Hewitt, a minor, and Guardia at Litem, Norma Harmer.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court grants and signed the Order to Distribute Settlement Funds, Order Approving Compromise of Minor's Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account.
See scanned doc. for details of the Orders.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Julie Grebel, Esq. and Christopher Andreas, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Edith Wilder, not present; Debbi Wilder Thompson, deceased; Yvonne Rozell, Melissa Thompson and Dale Thompson, are present; Holly Hewitt, a minor is not present, no petition filed and no guardian appointed.
After hearing the testimony, reviewed the moving papers and considered the evidence presented, the Court continued this matter to Sept. 29, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for filing of Minor's Petition, appearance by the guardian required.
